creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
Loading vboxdrv during run time is known to cause problems. Please load
vboxdrv via /boot/loader.conf:
vboxdrv_load="YES"

If your using VirtualBox 3.1.2 you could use the new rc.d script to load
the network related kernel modules during system startup. In this case
please add this to your /etc/rc.conf and reboot your system afterwards:
vboxnet_enable="YES"

Please take a look at our wiki page for other known problems:
http://wiki.freebsd.org/VirtualBox
